sql_array: CREATE TABLE centuries_test (id INTEGER, interval_value INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO centuries_test (id, interval_value) VALUES (1, to_centuries(5));
SELECT id, interval_value FROM centuries_test WHERE interval_value = to_centuries(5);
UPDATE centuries_test SET interval_value = to_centuries(10) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM interval_value) AS year FROM centuries_test WHERE interval_value > to_centuries(0);
